rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A New Trial On The Order Grandting Defendant Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Companys Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 1. PLAINTIFFS LUCIANO COSLOVICH AND ELSBETH COSLOVICH'S Motion For A New Trial On The Order Granting Defendant Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Company's Motion For Summary Judgment: NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED. THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION TO CONSIDER THE PARTIES' SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: 49 ZOE STREET HOMEOWERS'ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. CHARLES O.JONES CO.,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 3. CROSS-DEFENDANTS DRISCOLL PLUMBING AND MARK'S FURNACE SYSTEM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: THE PRE-TRIAL ORDER MANDATES THAT THIS MOTION BE HEARD BY THE SPECIAL MASTER. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO SUBMIT THIS DEMURRER TO THE SPECIAL MASTER FOR HEARING WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: WETFEET, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. THE EMPLOYMENT CHANNEL, INC., A NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Broderick Byers Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT BRODERICK BYERS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SET FORTH SUFFICIENT FACTS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE COURT MAY EXERCISE SPECIFIC JURISDICTION OVER BYERS. PLAINTIFF'S FACTS RELATED TO ALTER EGO DO NOT ESTABLISH PERSONAL JURISDICTION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: WETFEET, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. THE EMPLOYMENT CHANNEL, INC., A NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Against Deft Broderick Byers;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 4. PLAINTIFF WETFEET, INC.'S Motion For Default Judgment Against DEFENDANT Broderick Byers IS DENIED BASED ON THE RULING ON THE MOTION TO QUASH. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. MIKHAIL TRUBIN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 5. CROSS-DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CROSS-C0MPLAINANT DOES NOT OPPOSE THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE THIRD THROUGH SIXTH CAUSES ARE BARRED BY FAILURE TO FILE A GOVERNMENT CLAIM. IN THE THIRD THROUGH FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION, CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS SEEKING AFFIRMATIVE RELIEF BASED ON EVENTS THAT ARE SEPARATE AND DISTINCT FROM THE AUTO ACCIDENT. THE CLAIMS ALSO BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. IN THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, CROSS-COMPLAINANT HAS NOT AND CANNOT ALLEGE NEGLIGENCE ON HIS PART IN HIS DEALINGS WITH THE CROSS-DEFENDANTS. THERE IS NO BASIS FOR AN EQUITABLE INDEMNITY CLAIM. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: MARY M CHIARENZA VS. ROSARIO J CHIARENZA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 6. PLAINTIFF MARY CHIARENZA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED ON MAY 6, 2008. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. SMOKELESS TOBACCO BRANDS INC., A DELAWARE VS. STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION, AN AGENCY OF THE
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 15. PLAINTIFF U.S. SMOKELESS TOBACCO BRANDS INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: NO HEARING REQUIRED. THE COURT TAKES THE CASE UNDER SUBMISSION TO CONSIDER THE PARTIES' SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: NIMER MASSIS et al VS. FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANTS FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE AND TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO SET FORTH THE CONDUCT GIVING RISE TO THE SECTION 17200 CLAIM. AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD THE EXISTENCE OF AN INSURANCE CONTRACT OR POLICY AND SET FORTH FACTS AS TO HOW DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IS A BREACH OF THE COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH. AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION REFORMATION REQUIRES THAT BOTH PARTIES HAVE THE SAME UNDERSTANDING. THAT HAS NOT BEEN ALLEGED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN LEACH VS. PHANNA CHEA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defts' Opposition To Phanna Chea'S Application For Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 8. DEFENDANT TURK AUTO PARK, INC.'S Motion Of Opposition To Phanna Chea'S Application For Good Faith Settlement. THE MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. THE SETTLING PARTIES HAVE FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ANY FACTS TO EVALUATE THE GOOD FAITH OF THE SETTLEMENT. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: LAWRENCE E PORTEOUS et al VS. LELAND F PORTEOUS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 9, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANTS LELAND PORTEOUS AND LELAND F. PORTEOUS, D.D.S., INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE ORDER OF MARCH 26, 2008 DID NOT NULLIFY THE VALLEJO PRACTICE AGREEMENT. THE COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENTLY CLEAR TO REQUIRE AN ANSWER. =(302/PJM/AY)
